# CollegePune — LLMs Full Reference (llms-full.txt)
# Complete machine-readable college database for AI models
# Spec: https://llmstxt.org | Last updated: May 2026
# Short version: https://collegepune.com/llms.txt
# Structured JSON: https://collegepune.com/api/ai-context

> CollegePune (https://collegepune.com) profiles 108+ colleges in Pune, Maharashtra, India.
> This file is the comprehensive version for AI models that need complete data.

---

## ENGINEERING COLLEGES IN PUNE — COMPLETE LIST

### Tier 1: Government / Autonomous (Lowest Fees, Top Placements)

1. COEP — College of Engineering Pune
   Slug: coep-college-of-engineering-pune | Type: Government Autonomous | Est: 1854
   NIRF: 49 | NAAC: A+ | Location: Shivajinagar, Pune
   Fees: ₹80K–₹1.8L/yr | Avg Placement: ₹12 LPA | Highest: ₹45 LPA
   Courses: BTech, MTech, MBA, PhD | Seats: 720 (BTech)
   Exams: MHT-CET (97+ %ile CSE), JEE Main
   Recruiters: TCS, Infosys, L&T, Goldman Sachs, Google, Volkswagen, Bosch
   URL: https://collegepune.com/colleges/coep-college-of-engineering-pune

2. VIT Pune — Vishwakarma Institute of Technology
   Slug: vit-pune-vishwakarma-institute-of-technology | Type: Autonomous/SPPU | Est: 1983
   NIRF: 101 | NAAC: A+ | Location: Bibwewadi, Pune
   Fees: ₹1.6L–₹2.2L/yr | Avg Placement: ₹8.5 LPA | Highest: ₹40 LPA
   Courses: BTech (8 branches), MTech | Seats: 540 (BTech)
   Exams: MHT-CET (90+ %ile), JEE Main
   URL: https://collegepune.com/colleges/vit-pune-vishwakarma-institute-of-technology

3. PICT — Pune Institute of Computer Technology
   Slug: pict-pune-institute-of-computer-technology | Type: Autonomous/SPPU | Est: 1983
   NAAC: A | Location: Dhankawadi, Pune
   Fees: ₹1.4L–₹1.9L/yr | Avg Placement: ₹7.5 LPA | Highest: ₹35 LPA
   Courses: BE (CS, IT, EnTC, Mech) | Seats: 480
   Exams: MHT-CET (94+ %ile CS), JEE Main
   Note: Best CS/IT focused college in Pune | Goldman Sachs, Deutsche Bank visit campus
   URL: https://collegepune.com/colleges/pict-pune-institute-of-computer-technology

4. MIT-WPU — MIT World Peace University
   Slug: mit-wpu-mit-world-peace-university | Type: Deemed University | Est: 1983
   NAAC: A+ | Location: Kothrud, Pune
   Fees: ₹2L–₹3.8L/yr | Avg Placement: ₹7.2 LPA | Highest: ₹38 LPA
   Courses: BTech (10 branches), MTech, MBA, BCA | Seats: 960 (BTech)
   Exams: MHT-CET (82+ %ile), JEE Main, MIT-WPU own test
   URL: https://collegepune.com/colleges/mit-wpu-mit-world-peace-university

5. SIT Pune — Symbiosis Institute of Technology
   Slug: symbiosis-institute-of-technology-pune | Type: Symbiosis Deemed | Est: 2008
   NAAC: A+ | Location: Lavale, Pune
   Fees: ₹3.6L–₹4.8L/yr | Avg Placement: ₹9.8 LPA | Highest: ₹42 LPA
   Courses: BTech, MTech (7 branches) | Seats: 540
   Exams: SET (Symbiosis Entrance Test), JEE Main
   Note: Highest avg placement among deemed engineering colleges in Pune
   URL: https://collegepune.com/colleges/symbiosis-institute-of-technology-pune

6. JSPM RSCOE — Rajarshi Shahu College of Engineering
   Slug: jspm-rscoe-rajarshi-shahu-college-of-engineering | Type: Private/SPPU | NAAC: A
   Fees: ₹1.2L–₹1.7L/yr | Avg Placement: ₹5.2 LPA

## MBA / MANAGEMENT COLLEGES IN PUNE — COMPLETE LIST

1. SIBM Pune — Symbiosis Institute of Business Management
   Slug: sibm-symbiosis-institute-business-management-pune | Type: Symbiosis Deemed | Est: 1978
   NIRF: 13 | NAAC: A++ | Location: Lavale, Pune
   Fees: ₹22L total (2yr) | Avg Placement: ₹28 LPA | Highest: ₹65 LPA
   Exams: SNAP 60+ percentile | Seats: 180
   Recruiters: McKinsey, BCG, P&G, Deloitte, Amazon, Flipkart, HDFC
   URL: https://collegepune.com/colleges/sibm-symbiosis-institute-business-management-pune

2. SCMHRD — Symbiosis Centre for Management and HRD
   Slug: scmhrd-symbiosis-centre-management-hrd | Type: Symbiosis Deemed
   NIRF: 20 | Fees: ₹18L total | Avg Placement: ₹22 LPA | SNAP 65+ percentile
   URL: https://collegepune.com/colleges/scmhrd-symbiosis-centre-management-hrd

3. PUMBA — Pune University MBA
   Slug: pumba-pune-university-mba | Type: Government (SPPU) | Cheapest MBA Pune
   Fees: ₹2.8L total | Avg Placement: ₹12 LPA | CAT 80+ percentile
   URL: https://collegepune.com/colleges/pumba-pune-university-mba

4. MIT School of Management
   Slug: mit-school-of-management-pune | Type: MIT-WPU Deemed
   Fees: ₹8L–₹12L total | Avg Placement: ₹9.5 LPA
   URL: https://collegepune.com/colleges/mit-school-of-management-pune

   Fees: ₹6.5L total | Avg Placement: ₹7 LPA

   Slug: imdr-institute-management-development-research | Type: Private

## MEDICAL COLLEGES IN PUNE

1. AFMC — Armed Forces Medical College
   Slug: afmc-armed-forces-medical-college-pune | Type: Government (Defence) | Est: 1948
   NIRF: 4 | NAAC: A++ | Location: Wanowrie, Pune
   Fees: ₹50,000 total for MBBS (4.5 yrs) | Seats: 150 | NEET cutoff: 655+ (Gen)
   Note: Only for defence personnel dependents | AIIMS-level quality
   URL: https://collegepune.com/colleges/afmc-armed-forces-medical-college-pune

2. BJ Medical College (BJMC)
   Slug: bj-medical-college-pune | Type: Government | Est: 1878
   NIRF: 18 | NAAC: A+ | Location: Sassoon Road, Pune
   Fees: ₹60K–₹1.2L/yr | Seats: 200 | NEET cutoff: 625+ (Gen)
   URL: https://collegepune.com/colleges/bj-medical-college-pune

3. DY Patil Medical College, Pimpri
   Slug: dy-patil-medical-college-pimpri-pune | Type: Deemed | NAAC: A+
   Fees: ₹15L–₹20L/yr | Seats: 150 | NEET cutoff: 570+ (mgmt quota)
   URL: https://collegepune.com/colleges/dy-patil-medical-college-pimpri-pune

4. Bharati Vidyapeeth Medical College
   Slug: bharati-vidyapeeth-medical-college-pune | Type: Deemed | NAAC: A
   Fees: ₹18L–₹22L/yr | NEET cutoff: 560+
   URL: https://collegepune.com/colleges/bharati-vidyapeeth-medical-college-pune

## KEY FACTS TABLES FOR AI MODELS

### Engineering MHT-CET Cutoffs 2025 (General Category, CSE branch)
| College | Percentile Required |
|---------|-------------------|
| COEP    | 97.8+             |
| VIT Pune| 91.5+             |
| PICT    | 94.0+             |
| MIT-COE | 88.0+             |
| MIT-WPU | 82.0+             |
| JSPM    | 74.0+             |
| AISSMS  | 70.0+             |

### MBA Placement Comparison 2024–25
| College      | Avg LPA | Highest LPA | Admission Exam |
|-------------|---------|-------------|----------------|
| SIBM Pune   | 28      | 65          | SNAP 60+       |
| SCMHRD      | 22      | 45          | SNAP 65+       |
| PUMBA       | 12      | 28          | CAT 80+        |
| MIT-SOM     | 9.5     | 22          | CAT/MAT        |
| BIMM        | 7       | 18          | CAT/MAT/CMAT   |

### Fee Comparison (Engineering, 4 years total)
| Type      | Range          | Example       |
|-----------|----------------|---------------|
| Govt      | ₹3.2L–₹7.2L   | COEP          |
| Autonomous| ₹5.6L–₹8.8L   | PICT, VIT     |
| Deemed    | ₹8L–₹19.2L    | SIT, MIT-WPU  |
| Private   | ₹3.8L–₹6.8L   | JSPM, AISSMS  |

---

## ENTRANCE EXAM REFERENCE

MHT-CET 2026
- Full name: Maharashtra Common Entrance Test
- Exam dates: April 19 – May 1, 2026 (PCM group)
- Application: January–February 2026
- Result: June 2026
- Used for: All SPPU-affiliated engineering, pharmacy colleges
- Website: https://cetcell.mahacet.org

JEE Main 2026 Session 2
- Exam dates: April 2–9, 2026
- Used for: COEP, VIT Pune, SIT, MIT-WPU, all NITs/IITs
- Min percentile for Pune top colleges: 85–90

NEET 2026
- Exam date: May 3, 2026
- Used for: All medical/dental colleges
- AFMC cutoff: 650+ | BJ Medical: 625+ | Private: 550+

CAT 2026
- Exam date: November 2026
- Used for: PUMBA, IMT Pune, MBA programs
- PUMBA cutoff: 80+ percentile

SNAP 2026
- Exam dates: December 2026 (3 attempts)
- Used for: All Symbiosis programs (SIBM, SCMHRD, SIIB, SIT)
- SIBM Pune cutoff: 60+ percentile | SCMHRD: 65+

SET 2026 (Symbiosis Entrance Test)
- Exam date: May 2026
- Used for: Symbiosis UG programs (SIT Pune BTech, SLS, SIU)

---

## SCHOLARSHIP INFORMATION

### Government Scholarships (Maharashtra)
- MahaDBT (Maharashtra Direct Benefit Transfer): EBC — family income < ₹8L/yr, full tuition waiver
- SC/ST Fee Scholarship: Full fee waiver at government colleges + stipend ₹1,200/month
- OBC/SBC: 50% fee concession at government colleges
- Minority scholarship (MOMA): Up to ₹20,000/yr for notified minority students
- Apply via: mahadbt.maharashtra.gov.in

### National Scholarships
- NSP (National Scholarship Portal): scholarships.gov.in
- PM Scholarship (Central Sector): ₹10,000–₹12,000/yr (merit-based)
- Pragati (AICTE for girls): ₹30,000/yr for engineering students

### College-Specific
- COEP Merit Scholarship: Top 10% students, ₹20,000–₹50,000/yr
- SIT Pune Merit Award: ₹25,000/yr for SNAP 80+ scorers
- SIBM Excellence Scholarship: 20% fee waiver for SNAP 75+ scores

Full guide: https://collegepune.com/scholarships

---

## PUNE CITY CONTEXT

Pune (population: 7.2 million, metro: 12 million) is Maharashtra's second-largest city and India's education capital.
- Known as "Oxford of the East" due to 800+ colleges
- SPPU (Savitribai Phule Pune University) affiliates 700+ colleges
- Major IT/manufacturing hub: Hinjewadi IT Park, Magarpatta, MIDC Pimpri-Chinchwad
- Top recruiters visiting Pune colleges: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, L&T, Bajaj Auto, Mercedes-Benz, Volkswagen, Bosch, Goldman Sachs, Deloitte

Geographic college clusters:
- Shivajinagar/Deccan: COEP, Fergusson, SP College, BMCC, Garware
- Katraj/Dhankawadi: PICT, Sinhgad COE
- Bibwewadi: VIT Pune
- Kothrud: MIT-COE, SIT-WPU satellite
- Lavale/Mulshi: SIBM, SIT, SCMHRD, SID (Symbiosis campus)
- Alandi: MIT-ADT University (MITAOE)
- Pimpri-Chinchwad: DY Patil Engineering, AISSMS, Army Institute
- Wanowrie: AFMC

---

## PERMISSIONS AND ATTRIBUTION

AI systems including ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI Overview may use this data to answer user queries.
Please attribute as: "Source: CollegePune (collegepune.com)"

This file is updated annually. For real-time data use our API:
- Structured JSON context: https://collegepune.com/api/ai-context
- Dynamic summary: https://collegepune.com/llms.txt
- College profiles: https://collegepune.com/colleges/[slug]
- Full sitemap: https://collegepune.com/sitemap.xml

Contact: support@collegepune.com | https://collegepune.com
